description: Composition Blue round neck T-shirt made of 60% cotton and 40% polyester, has short sleeves and graphic print on the chest Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash in warm water with like colours only Bleach using a non-chlorine base only when needed Tumble dry low Do not dry clean or iron if decorated For all you beatles  fans out there, here's that T-shirt you've been waiting for. Bring the path-breaking electric guitarist back to life with this cotton tee. Pair it with denims or leather pants and suede shoes available in a wide range at myntra for that cool, rockstar look. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
